goals: Keep backend headless and CLI-first while allowing a standalone frontend to evolve independently.
Freeze the current API surface as a versioned contract even though the runtime URLs are still unversioned.
Let the frontend consume documented stable fields and ignore extra debug/diagnostic payloads.

compatibility.contract_versioning_strategy: Document versioning via /api/contracts/frontend-v1, not via URL path changes.
compatibility.unknown_fields_policy: Frontend clients must ignore unknown object fields.
compatibility.nullable_fields_policy: Missing and null should be treated equivalently unless explicitly required.
compatibility.error_normalization_recommendation: Frontend SDK should normalize flat {error} and {status,error} bodies into one client-side error type.

flatError.description: Most current endpoints return a flat error body on non-2xx.

statusError.description: Config mutation endpoints may return a status-bearing error body.

runtimeStatus.description: Commander runtime snapshot. Frontend should rely on documented top-level sections and ignore unknown fields inside nested diagnostic objects.

trainingExecution.description: Result of executing a training plan or the convenience /api/train shortcut.

dataSourceUnavailableError.description: Structured 503 payload returned when live training data could not be resolved and mock mode was not explicitly enabled.

protocol.resume_behavior: best-effort only; client should reconnect and refresh status if history gaps occur
